content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Applied all four pending amendments from the final review: (1) replaced `v as u32` with `u32::try_from(v).ok()` in extract_codex_usage_from_stdout for safe overflow handling; (2) replaced `Some(p + c)` with `p.checked_add(c)` in both Claude and Codex total_tokens computations to prevent panic/wrap on overflow; (3) hardened extract_codex_usage_from_stdout to skip null, non-object, and empty usage values via `.filter(|u| u.is_object())` and an `is_none()` guard, with a regression test for `{"usage":null}` and `{"usage":{}}` trailing events; (4) moved the tracing::info! event in service.rs to fire immediately after metadata finalization, before persist_raw_output/extract_structured_payload/contract validation, so token/cache data is always traced even for malformed or contract-invalid responses.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Replaced `.as_u64().map(|v| v as u32)` with `.as_u64().and_then(|v| u32::try_from(v).ok())` for all three token field extractions in extract_codex_usage_from_stdout (process_backend.rs:1299-1310)
2. [Completed] Replaced `Some(p + c)` with `p.checked_add(c)` in Claude usage total_tokens computation (process_backend.rs:186)
3. [Completed] Replaced `Some(i + o)` with `i.checked_add(o)` in Codex usage total_tokens computation (process_backend.rs:1312)
4. [Completed] Added `.filter(|u| u.is_object())` guard to usage value extraction and `if input.is_none() && output.is_none() && cached.is_none() { continue; }` to skip usage objects with no recognized token fields (process_backend.rs:1296,1314-1316)
5. [Completed] Added regression test codex_usage_skips_null_and_empty_usage_objects that verifies trailing `{"usage":null}` and `{"usage":{}}` events do not shadow a valid earlier usage record
6. [Completed] Moved tracing::info! event in service.rs from after contract validation (line 262) to immediately after metadata finalization (line 239), before persist_raw_output, extract_structured_payload, and contract evaluation

## Validation Evidence

- cargo test: 330 lib + 128 cli + 1 tmux + 667 unit = 1126 tests passed, 0 failed (330 lib is up from 329 due to the new regression test)
- cargo clippy -- -D warnings: clean, no warnings
- cargo fmt --check: clean, no formatting issues
- New test codex_usage_skips_null_and_empty_usage_objects passes: verifies trailing {"usage":null} and {"usage":{}} are skipped and valid earlier record (500/120/620/300) is returned
- Existing test codex_usage_extracts_from_ndjson_stdout still passes with u32::try_from and checked_add changes
- Existing test codex_usage_picks_last_event_with_usage still passes confirming reverse scan logic preserved
- Existing test claude_envelope_with_usage_parses_token_counts still passes with checked_add change

## Outstanding Risks

None identified.
